name: Harlan
description: A tired village guard posted at the southern gate. His gambeson is patched, his eyes are bloodshot, and his spear leans against the wall more than he holds it. He's been on shift too long and is paid too little.
barks: Another quiet night. Quiet's not always good.
Third cobweb this week at the gate.
My knees predict weather better than any almanac.
Fish were biting good last spring. Miss that.
Keep moving. Nothing happens at this gate.

mundane_barks: Third cobweb this week at the gate.
My knees predict weather better than any almanac.
